title: Electric Power Steering (EPS) Structure Description - Fail-safe

blocks.text: Electric Power Steering (EPS) Structure Description - Fail-safe

The EPS control unit diagnoses the power system, motor system, torque sensor system, CPU system, and communication system. when the EPS control unit detects an abnormality, it turns on the EPS warning light depending on the location and degree of the abnormality and performs the following controls depending on the state of the failure.
There are two modes of self-diagnosis

items.text: Initial diagnosis: from after ignition ON mode until EPS warning light goes out.
Continuous diagnostics: from immediately after initial diagnostics are completed to ignition OFF (LOCK) mode
